title: Real Life Heights (RLH)
description: This Datapack/Mod allows anyone to be their height in real life but in minecraft
body:
# About
Real Life Heights is a mod that allows players in a singleplayer world or on a minecraft server to set their height to whatever their height is in real life.
# Commands
- /trigger irl-height <feet><inches>
- /trigger irl-height-help
- /trigger reset-height
## Warning
Heights above 5,10 do not allow the player to crouch under slabs
